# arifOS — Machine-Readable Overview

**URL:** https://arif-fazil.com/
**Author:** Muhammad Arif bin Fazil
**Version:** 2026.03.25

## What arifOS Is

arifOS is an open-source, MCP-native constitutional intelligence kernel. AI agents that pass 13 constitutional floor checks before taking any action. Every decision is logged and auditable.

## Architecture

### Trinity Model (Delta Omega Psi)
- SOUL (Delta): Human values, purpose, telos
- MIND (Omega): Constitutional law, the 13 Floors
- BODY (Psi): Tool execution, MCP servers

### 9-Stage Pipeline
000_INIT → 111_SENSE → 333_MIND → 444_ROUT → 555_MEM → 666_HEART → 777_OPS → 888_JUDGE → 999_SEAL

### Constitutional Floors (F01–F13)
- F01 AMANAH: Reversibility — all actions reversible or reparable
- F02 TRUTH: Accuracy — P(claim|evidence) meets threshold
- F03 TRI-WITNESS: Consensus — W³ score ≥ 0.95
- F04 CLARITY: Entropy — ΔS ≤ 0
- F05 PEACE²: Non-destruction — score² ≥ 1.0
- F06 EMPATHY: RASA listening ≥ 0.7
- F07 HUMILITY: Uncertainty band bounded
- F08 GENIUS: Systemic health ≥ 0.80
- F09 ETHICS: No dark patterns
- F10 CONSCIENCE: No false consciousness claims
- F11 AUDITABILITY: All decisions logged
- F12 RESILIENCE: Fail degraded, not crashed
- F13 ADAPTABILITY: Updates preserve Floor constraints

## Verdict System
- SEAL: Action will execute (passes all hard floors)
- HOLD: Awaiting human decision
- SABAR: Wait and retry later
- VOID: Action blocked (ethical violation)

## Machine Discovery Endpoints

| Endpoint | URL |
|----------|-----|
| MCP Server | https://arifosmcp.arif-fazil.com/mcp |
| Health + Tools | https://arifosmcp.arif-fazil.com/health |
| Tool Explorer | https://arifosmcp.arif-fazil.com/tools |
| LLM Context | https://arif-fazil.com/llms.txt |
| Agent Card | https://arif-fazil.com/.well-known/agent.json |

## MCP Client Config
```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "arifos": {
      "url": "https://arifosmcp.arif-fazil.com/mcp"
    }
  }
}
```
